title: Add Student Progress Dashboard
requirement_excerpt:
# Requirement: Add Student Progress Dashboard

## Goal
Build a dashboard that shows progress by subject, topic, quiz score, and mastery level.

## Expected Outcome
- Dashboard page created
- API endpoint added if required
- Tests added
- Existing tests pass

## Constraints
- Use existing frontend layout
- Do not introduce a new UI library
- Do not change authentication flow

## Validation
- npm test passes
- npm run lint passes

tasks.title: Inspection and Architecture Discovery
success_criteria: Identified existing frontend layout components and routing system.
Mapped data structures for student progress (subjects, topics, quiz scores, mastery).
Identified API patterns used for data fetching in the existing dashboard.

tasks.title: Implement Progress API Endpoints
success_criteria: New API endpoint created to serve aggregated student progress data.
Data returned includes subject-wise scores and mastery levels.
API implementation adheres to existing project patterns and auth constraints.
Unit tests for the new endpoint pass.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard UI and Integration
success_criteria: Dashboard page created using the existing frontend layout.
Progress data displayed by subject, topic, and mastery level.
No new UI libraries introduced; strictly used existing styles.
Frontend correctly fetches and displays data from the new API.

tasks.title: Verification and Compliance Check
success_criteria: All new and existing tests pass (npm test).
Linter checks pass without errors (npm run lint).
Verified that authentication flow remains unchanged.

tasks.title: Documentation and Progress Update
success_criteria: Updated docs/progress.md with details of the new dashboard and API.
Ensured all implemented features are reflected in the progress tracking.
